steps.voice: First boot — the dash scans your CAN bus at four common bitrates.
500 kilobits — the most common automotive rate. Apply.
Pick your ECU. Presets cover Haltech, Link, MaxxECU, MegaSquirt, ECU Master, Ford, plus an RDM-7 Internal calculated-gear option.
Haltech Nexus / Elite is pre-selected. Apply.
Three ways to connect to the web editor: Wi-Fi, USB, or the dash's own hotspot.
Mode on the left, networks on the right. Pick Home 2.4.
Connected. Your dash's IP shows up in Device Settings for the web editor.
And this is what you've set up — live CAN data rendered through the default layout.
